titleStmt.title: SII 24.430: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 430. (A.R. No. 40 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of a pendant (padakam) with a large ruby in the centre, eight red stones and ten sapphires around 4 large and two small diamonds to god Raṅganātha by Periya Tirumalaidēva Mahārāja, son of Salakkai[ya]dēva-Mahārāja. The details of date viz. Śaka 1459, Hēviḷambi, Vṛiśchika, śu. 3., Sunday, Kēṭṭai correspond to 1537 A.D., November 4, ·96. The nakshatra was current throughout and ended at ·01 on the following day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrīman mahārājādhirāja parameśvara śrīvirapradāpa śrī Accutadevamahārāyar pṛthuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 9 Itaṉ mel cellā niṉṟa Eviḷampi samvatsarattu vṛccikanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tikaiyumRead tṛtiyaiyumĀtitya vāramum peṟṟa keṭṭai nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇḍikulāśanivaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkaṉ
tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevarku svasti śrīmanmahāmaṇḍelaśvararāna salakkai devamahārājāviṉ putran periyatirumalai devamahārājā tammuṭaiya kayiṅkariyam Āka perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar nāḷ toṟum cāttiyaruḷa samarppitta muṟukkukkuttina muttiṉ mukappuppatakam Oṉṟukku naṭunāyakam periya ḻuttu Oṉṟu cuṟṟuccivappukkallu Eṭṭu paccaikkallu pattu periya vayiram nālum ciṟu vayiram Ira
ṇṭu Āka vayiram Āṟu Āka muttu kallu taṅkam Arakku pipañatra Ommasam Uḷppaṭa Eṭai muppattu mukkaḻañcukku cakkarattūkkam nāṟpattu Iraṇṭum paṇaviṭai Oṉpatu � . śrīmattirumalādhiśaḥ patakam raṅgabaḍave . Ekamuktā ñcitam prādādanaghannijabhūtaye . Inta śilaśā�sanam Eḻutiṉamaikkuk kovil k kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 24.430 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
